locations.name: 马格达莱纳河
locations.summary: 马格达莱纳河（西班牙語：Río Magdalena）是哥伦比亚境内的主要河流。它得名于圣经人物抹大拉的马里亚。 马格达莱纳河发源于哥伦比亚乌伊拉省境内的安第斯山脉，向北流淌，最终在巴兰基亚注入加勒比海，全长约1,540公里，流域面积26万…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Northern barred woodcreeper
relations.evidence: punctipectus, northern Colombia from the valley of the Magdalena River east into northwestern Venezuela (Note that the map excludes this subspecies' range.) The northern barred woodcreeper primarily inhabits humid tall evergreen forest

relations.subject: Northern barred woodcreeper
relations.evidence: It also occurs in less tall forest, gallery forest, semi-deciduous forest, and mangroves, and even less frequently in cloudforest and pine-oak woodlands

relations.subject: Northern barred woodcreeper
relations.evidence: The "eastern" barred woodcreeper is "[p]robably among the most threatened of all dendrocolaptids as a result of extensive habitat destruction within its highly restricted, lowland range"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
